category_sources: source_facts.description says 6502 C compiler; official cc65 documentation overview describes cc65 as a C compiler for 6502 targets and includes assembler, linker, simulator, and related tools.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cc65; official website and documentation use cc65.
docs_sources: Official cc65 site provides a documentation overview and users guide; official getting-started page documents setup and initial use.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/cc65/cc65, so repo is returned as null per instruction not to second-guess existing repository values.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables list compiler, assembler, linker, disassembler, simulator, and utilities; official documentation describes 6502 targets and program documentation for the cc65 toolchain.
